summary: The implementation maps to the endpoint-tool-management spec and satisfies the active task. Guarded deletion is implemented in the endpoint service/API/UI, audit events are persisted without submitted delete codes or root passwords, endpoint-dependent Prisma child records cascade safely, deleted endpoints are removed from list data, docs were updated, and the required deterministic checks are recorded as passing.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Deleting with the correct endpoint delete code succeeds.
Deleting with a wrong delete code fails and writes audit evidence with non-secret metadata.
Root password override succeeds and audit metadata records only method root_password, not the secret.
Deleted endpoints are no longer returned by endpoint list/search data after refresh.
Required commands passed: npm run test:unit, npm run test:e2e -- --grep @endpoint-delete-audit, and npm run verify.
